steps.title: Use the precision clue
steps.content: The second sentence says the Mexica could precisely identify dates such as solstices by observing the sun against mountain landmarks. The blank therefore needs a word for accuracy or precision.

steps.title: Reject unrelated qualities
steps.content: Choice A suggests uncertainty or instability, the opposite of precise dating. Choice C means the ability to recover from hardship. Choice D means being hard to notice, which does not describe time tracking. The answer is B.
